TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspacePrimariesCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies the color primaries of a color space using CICP (ITU-T H.273) code points.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspacePrimariesCicp` identifies the color primaries of a color space using CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) values defined in ITU-T H.273. These values are used together with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp> when calling <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp,SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp)> to create a well-known color space.
## Examples
```csharp // Create a Rec. 2020 color space with PQ transfer function using var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec2020, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Pq); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp GenericFilm = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Generic film color primaries (CICP code point 8).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp ItuTH273Value22 = int32(22)

Docs.summary: Color primaries corresponding to ITU-T H.273 value 22 (EG 432-1 Display P3 primaries).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec2020 = int32(9)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 color primaries, used for ultra-high-definition television (CICP code point 9).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System BG color primaries, corresponding to PAL/SECAM broadcast (CICP code point 5).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M color primaries, corresponding to NTSC broadcast (CICP code point 4).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 color primaries, used for standard-definition television (CICP code point 6).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 color primaries, used for high-definition television and sRGB (CICP code point 1).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteEg4321 = int32(12)

Docs.summary: SMPTE EG 432-1 (DCI P3) color primaries (CICP code point 12).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteRp4312 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: SMPTE RP 431-2 (DCI P3) color primaries with DCI white point (CICP code point 11).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240 color primaries (CICP code point 7).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(10)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 (DCDM XYZ) color primaries (CICP code point 10).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: Unknown or unspecified color primaries (CICP code point 0).
